redis_py.signature: arrindex(, name: str,, path: str,, scalar: int,, start: Optional[int] = None,, stop: Optional[int] = None,)

jedis.signature: long jsonArrIndex(String key, Path path, Object scalar)
List<Long> jsonArrIndex(String key, Path2 path, Object scalar)

lettuce_sync.signature: List<Long> jsonArrindex(K key, JsonPath jsonPath, JsonValue value, JsonRangeArgs range)

params.name: key
params.description: the key holding the JSON document.

params.name: jsonPath
params.description: the JsonPath pointing to the array inside the document.

params.name: range
params.description: the JsonRangeArgs to search within.

returns.description: Long the index hosting the searched element, -1 if not found or null if the specified path is not an array. @since 6.8
